name: ERPSMART Builder Module Dependency Impact Map
purpose: List dependencies that future disable, uninstall, delete, rollback, and capability removal flows must inspect.

current_read_only_implementation.notes: Current analyzer is the read-only dependency check implementation. It reports conflicts and planned impact but does not publish, run migrations, or write runtime files. It may write a derived diagnostic artifact under storage/app/builder-publish-readiness. The dry-run generator creates sandbox artifacts under storage/app/builder-publish-dry-runs for dependency review only.

routes.impact_on_disable: Gate or hide runtime routes without deleting route files.
routes.impact_on_uninstall: Remove generated route registrations using publish manifest.
routes.impact_on_delete: Delete only generated route files after backup and dependency check.
routes.required_check: Route names, API paths, frontend route paths, middleware, and conflicts.
routes.agent_notes: Never delete existing first-party routes as a side effect.

menus.impact_on_disable: Hide menu entries while preserving permissions and data.
menus.impact_on_uninstall: Remove generated menu registration from manifest.
menus.impact_on_delete: Delete generated menu code only after backup.
menus.required_check: Menu ids, order, settings links, and cached menu metadata.
menus.agent_notes: Prefer menu gating for existing modules.

permissions.impact_on_disable: Keep permissions auditable; deny or hide actions.
permissions.impact_on_uninstall: Archive generated permissions or mark inactive.
permissions.impact_on_delete: Delete only when no audit requirement remains.

policies.impact_on_uninstall: Remove generated policy registration from manifest.
policies.impact_on_delete: Delete generated policy files only after dependency check.
policies.required_check: Policy class, auth gates, resource ownership.
policies.agent_notes: Do not modify Core policy behavior in removal flow.

models.impact_on_disable: Models remain available for data retention and admin recovery.
models.impact_on_uninstall: Remove generated model files after data decision.
models.impact_on_delete: Delete generated model files only from manifest.

migrations.impact_on_uninstall: Plan rollback or forward cleanup migrations.
migrations.impact_on_delete: Destructive migration requires backup and explicit approval.
migrations.required_check: Migration status, schema state, rollback availability.
migrations.agent_notes: Do not run generated migrations from the current MVP.

tables.impact_on_uninstall: Retain, export, archive, migrate, or drop data based on approved plan.
tables.impact_on_delete: Drop only with backup, retention approval, and irreversible warning.
tables.required_check: Row counts, foreign keys, indexes, custom field columns, data retention rules.
tables.agent_notes: Dropping tables is forbidden for AI execution.

custom fields.impact_on_disable: Field UI can be hidden; data retained.
custom fields.impact_on_uninstall: Custom field metadata and values require retention decision.
custom fields.required_check: Field definitions, options, values, indexes, saved views.
custom fields.agent_notes: Current custom field storage must be respected.

relations.impact_on_disable: Related UI can be hidden while foreign keys remain.
relations.impact_on_uninstall: Foreign keys and dependent modules must be analyzed.
relations.impact_on_delete: Relation columns/tables require explicit schema plan.
relations.required_check: belongsTo, hasMany, pivots, foreign keys, delete behavior.
relations.agent_notes: Relations are one of the highest-risk removal blockers.

activities.impact_on_uninstall: Detach or archive associations based on policy.

notes.impact_on_uninstall: Archive or detach notes using retention policy.

comments.impact_on_uninstall: Archive or detach comments based on policy.
comments.required_check: commentable types, activity comments, note comments.

media.impact_on_delete: Delete files only with backup and approval.
media.required_check: media rows, storage paths, file references, backups.

imports/exports.impact_on_delete: Do not delete imported records as a side effect.
imports/exports.agent_notes: Operational history may depend on import/export.

search indexes.impact_on_disable: Remove or suppress disabled module from search results.
search indexes.required_check: global search actions, indexed fields, cache state.
search indexes.agent_notes: Search indexes are derived and rebuildable.

workflows/automation metadata.impact_on_uninstall: Archive workflow definitions and execution history.
workflows/automation metadata.required_check: triggers, jobs, logs, tasks, emails, approvals, notifications.
workflows/automation metadata.agent_notes: Builder metadata must not execute directly.

formLayout metadata.impact_on_disable: Ignore renderer metadata while retaining definition.
formLayout metadata.impact_on_delete: Delete only draft metadata if never published.
formLayout metadata.agent_notes: Currently metadata-only but future renderers may depend on it.

cache.impact_on_uninstall: Rebuild runtime caches after generated artifacts are removed.
cache.required_check: cache keys, locks, menu cache, route/resource metadata.
cache.agent_notes: Cache is derived and not source of truth.

built assets.impact_on_uninstall: Future build process must remove generated frontend entries safely.
built assets.impact_on_delete: Delete only generated assets from manifest.
built assets.required_check: frontend route entries, component files, compiled build artifacts.
built assets.agent_notes: Do not edit public/build in planning tasks.

RAG manifests.impact_on_disable: Mark module disabled in derived indexes.
RAG manifests.impact_on_uninstall: Update curated manifests and rebuild indexes.
RAG manifests.impact_on_delete: Remove derived RAG references after source truth changes.
RAG manifests.required_check: RAG contracts, architecture docs, exclusions, source evidence.
RAG manifests.agent_notes: RAG guidance is derived, not runtime truth.

vector indexes.impact_on_disable: Rebuild or filter disabled module vectors.
vector indexes.impact_on_delete: Remove vectors after source deletion is approved.
vector indexes.required_check: index namespace, source document ids, rebuild plan.
vector indexes.agent_notes: Vector indexes are derived and rebuildable.

backups/snapshots.impact_on_uninstall: Required before file, migration, or data changes.
backups/snapshots.impact_on_delete: Required and must be verified before destructive delete.
backups/snapshots.required_check: backup completeness, restore test, checksum, retention.
backups/snapshots.agent_notes: No destructive operation should proceed without backup.
